issues.description: TrashFromHand filter is incorrect. The card to trash must come from hand but should not be restricted to Character type. The DSL should allow trashing any card type from hand.

The two KO actions are sequential (thenActions implies both execute after trash). However, the card text indicates these are independent options: 'up to 1...AND up to 1...' suggesting two separate KO actions that can each be chosen independently. The structure should reflect that both can be performed from a single trash, not sequentially dependent.
KO target scope is incorrect. Should target opponent's Characters (not just 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'). Target should specify scope as opponent Characters with maxCost constraint applied properly.
